$comment: Catalog entry for the Codex plugin marketplace. Submission process per https://developers.openai.com/codex/plugins/build. Schema is provisional — refine against the official submission requirements before publishing.
name: expression
summary: Spreadsheet-as-DAG modeling skills for the `expression` CLI.
description: Build, iterate on, and export financial / planning models written as Python DAGs. Ships the same eight modeling skills as the Claude Code plugin.
